TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Tamorak == O tamorak/o ciyak. O tamolak hananay i todongay tadafongcalay a maro dateng, itini i posong haw i, o ciyak hanangra a pangangan, ano hapinangen ko tomolak i, adihay koka sasiloma nira, irako tata'akay ko heci, irako ki^mingay ko heci, irako mato rifer no paliding a heci, irako mato to'to' a heci, halo ya ko^ngelay a teloc papah nira tada fangca:lay a kala datengen, sanaw nano 'ayaw o tamolak i otada da:teng no mita o Pangcah, ano i rotok to, ano i enal to, manga'ay to paloma to kolotamolak. Naicowaay ama lengn'ak ko tamorak/ciyak. Ano dodoen ko fana' nomi kingkiway i, o sowal nangra to pakayraay to lalengn'atan no tamorak i, naitiniay i Amirika ami salingato sanay, itiraay ko tatapangan nira saan, Nanqua hananay sanaw adi:hay itini i Amirika komatilaay, o sasanga'en nangra to Nanqua pay , lomasato malawod ko wansenchiy nangra o tamorak to ko sasang'aen nagnra to maama:an, sanaw i Amirika ko saadihaiy to tamorak/ciyak. Dodosato a tayni tini ino holaman a kanatal niyaro amarenak halo Taywan amapolong, aca ataynito iromaroma a finacadan. O pinangan no tamorak/ciyak. O pinangan no tamorak i, o milaladay ko rengaw nira matiya o masay, ano i 'enal a sotad, roma i kilang ami kalic, sanaw ira ko mipalangraay ami paloma to tamorak, nikaolira a ciheciay to tata'akay ko heci i, caay kaga'ay palangraen, matiyahan to sinal ami paloma i sera a papi dapdap ami lalad, tia cihci sato cingra i fangcalay a arang amiritod, ya kimingay ko heci i mipalanglaan amaca'it ko heci nira, o tomolak hawi caay ka 'dengan o heci nira kamaka'enay, ya koengelay a teroc ato hana nira i, tada fangcalay a marodateng, romasato yapapah nira nawhani kakahaday ngaay sapitafo to felac ami tangtang to hemay ato hakhak, hanaw irako mipanganganay to fankoa sanay,lomasa mato 'ekim ko kamaroro nira sanaw i o chinkoa han nangra a pangangan, oromasato nawhani adi:hay itini i inaka, sanaw ira ko panganganay to fangkoa sanay. O karengawan to cecay a mihecaan i itiraay to kacihrangan ato karawfawan, marawod toko roma a mihecaan i madeng to ko to'as nira a ciheci to, matafesiw to toro a mihecaan i, mariteng to mafadi' ma'icang mapatay cingra. O heci no tamorak/ciyak. O heci no tamorak/ciyak hawi, sahto maloloay ko adihaiay, caay ka^dengan aca a karadatengen, adihaiay ko iofong nira, fangcalay pacamolen i hemay a komaen, iraay ko ő≤-foloposo , ato fitamin to C/E nira, o saka ci'icel a tanektek no tileng a caay kaci adada tora 'ekan hananay, ano mitangtang to heci nira i, mang'aay halo podac han ami tangtang, oya kakoc nira fangcalay temoen a komaen, iraay koya sin hananay to saka ramakat no remes, sanaw o sowal no ihekkalay to kalocimacimahawiy "komaen to tamorak to sapatongal to remes saan" . Mang'aay sano Padakaen ami tangtang tora nangkapay ato tankaw , mang'aay a saholoen to hemay, nikaorila ono nomita o pangcah i sakohaw hanaca halopapah ato hana nira ato o kalomaanmaan ami pacacamol. Dengansa caay kangaay a pacefasa apacacamol to roma a datengan, kafan'ato ami na'on to sapipacamol, olomasato caay kang'aay a misa adihay ta:to a koma^en, nawhani takalaw kora tinfen nira, ano matafesiw ko kakomaen i, tosaka tatiih aca no tileng. Masamaanay kopi satamorak/ciyak no pangcah/'Amis. Nanoto'as tahanini halafinaiy to kopi satamorak/ciyak no mita o pangcah, awaay to kopinang to mihcaan, nikaolira mananamay to ami satamorak/ciyak ko to'as no mita o pangcah/'Amis, ano itini to irikot, ano itini to iomah aca irotok ami sarafal, mangaay to ami paloma to tamorak/ciyak, roma palilis itini i rawac taliyok no omah, ano malarok ami pananom ami patayhi i, fangcal ko rengaw adihay koheci nira, dengansa caay kang'aay a matiya o saitaw a mipawali ami na'ang ami sahalafin, o sapipaloma to tamorak i, pakaylaay toya kakoc nira, yacaho kapi tangtang to heci no tamorak/ciyak i, miri'ayaw ami ara to kakoc nira ami pawali ami 'icang, dodosato marawod kopipalomaan i, araen kora kakoc ami rafong i sera to sota', ta romengaw kora tamorak/ciyak, maara ko pangkiw no mihcaan i, ma^deng to ko to'as nira ami lalad i, yacaho kaciheci i nga'aiay to a datengen, yaheci nira i yacahoka'ikes i, nga'ay to ri'ayawen amiara, roma i ano matatodong ko 'ikes nira i, fangcalay halo podach han ami tantaneng, e^dengsa ano 'atekak tato ko podach nira i podachenho tiya dangdangen. Omaan ko nana'ongen a komaen to tamorak/ciyak. Haiy fangcal toko tamorak/ciyak akaradatengen a komaen sakita, nikaolira, ano caay kapina'on i, o sakatati'ih no tileng, o maan kora nana'onen, ora tamorak/ciyak hawi tatiih apacamolen to karang a komaen, ano ka^nen hawi, o mara sakawarak ko tamdaw, romasato ano o foting tora liyi hananay ato o hala ato o titi no sili tatiihay to ama cacamol, tangtang hanaca ami sakohaw, akato pacamolen to tomato ato damdam, oya takalaway ko wesenso/C tora pocay , yocay hananay i, caay ka fangcal a macacamol. Sanaw kapina'on to amitangtang a koma^en, hapinangen to ko sapacacamol tiya caay ka kali'ang ko tileng. (Siwkolan 'Amis Suman2023/06/18) TahapinanganŚŹÉŤÄÉśĖáÁćĽ: √ė ŚćóÁďúÁöĄÁáüť§äśąźŚąÜ. √ė .
S.PHON: == tamo~urak == o~u tamo~urak/o~u ¶ijak. o~u tamo~u…ĺak ńßananaj i to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ta…¨~…ģafo~uŇč ¶a…ĺaj a maro~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, itini i po~uso~uŇč ńßaw i, o~u ¶ijak ńßanaŇčra a paŇčaŇčan, ano~u ńßapinaŇč…ôn ko~u to~umo~u…ĺak i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~uka sasi…ĺo~uma nira, irako~u tata °akaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u ki ĒmiŇčaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u mato~u rif…ôr no~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč a ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u mato~u to~u °to~u ° a ńß…ô ¶i, ńßa…ĺo~u ja ko~u ĒŇč…ô…ĺaj a t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ papańß nira ta…¨~…ģa faŇč ¶a:…ĺaj a ka…ĺa …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, sanaw nano~u °ajaw o~u tamo~u…ĺak i o~uta…¨~…ģa …¨~…ģa:t…ôŇč no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß, ano~u i ro~uto~uk to~u, ano~u i …ôna…ĺ to~u, maŇča °aj to~u pa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~u…ĺo~utamo~u…ĺak. nai ¶o~uwaaj ama …ĺ…ôŇčn °ak ko~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. ano~u …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u…ôn ko~u fana ° no~umi kiŇčkiwaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ naŇčra to~u pakajraaj to~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčn °atan no~u tamo~urak i, naitiniaj i amirika ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u sanaj, itiraaj ko~u tatapaŇčan nira saan, nan*o~u~ua ńßananaj sanaw a…¨~…ģi:ńßaj itini i amirika ko~umati…ĺaaj, o~u sasaŇča °…ôn naŇčra to~u nan*o~u~ua paj , …ĺo~umasato~u ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u wans…ôn ¶ńßij naŇčra o~u tamo~urak to~u ko~u sasaŇč °a…ôn na*nra to~u maama:an, sanaw i amirika ko~u saa…¨~…ģińßaij to~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u a tajni tini ino~u ńßo~u…ĺaman a kanata…ĺ nijaro~u amar…ônak ńßa…ĺo~u tajwan amapo~u…ĺo~uŇč, a ¶a atajnito~u iro~umaro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~u pinaŇčan no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. o~u pinaŇčan no~u tamo~urak i, o~u mi…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģaj ko~u r…ôŇčaw nira matija o~u masaj, ano~u i °…ôna…ĺ a so~uta…¨~…ģ, ro~uma i ki…ĺaŇč ami ka…ĺi ¶, sanaw ira ko~u mipa…ĺaŇčraaj ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u tamo~urak, nikao~u…ĺira a ¶ińß…ô ¶iaj to~u tata °akaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i i, ¶aaj ka*a °aj pa…ĺaŇčra…ôn, matijańßan to~u sina…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uma i s…ôra a papi …¨~…ģap…¨~…ģap ami …ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ, tia ¶ińß ¶i sato~u ¶iŇčra i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a araŇč amirito~u…¨~…ģ, ja kimiŇčaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i i mipa…ĺaŇč…ĺaan ama ¶a °it ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, o~u ma °i ¶aŇč mapataj ¶iŇčra. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak ńßawi, sańßto~u ma…ĺo~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u a…¨~…ģińßaiaj, ¶aaj ka Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan a ¶a a kara…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, ¶aaj ka ¶i a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~ura °…ôkan ńßananaj, ano~u mitaŇčtaŇč to~u ńß…ô ¶i nira i, maŇč °aaj ńßa…ĺo~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ ńßan ami taŇčtaŇč, o~uja kako~u ¶ nira faŇč ¶a…ĺaj t…ômo~u…ôn a ko~uma…ôn, iraaj ko~uja sin ńßananaj to~u saka ramakat no~u r…ôm…ôs, sanaw o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ińß…ôkka…ĺaj to~u ka…ĺo~u ¶ima ¶imańßawij "ko~uma…ôn to~u tamo~urak to~u sapato~uŇča…ĺ to~u r…ôm…ôs saan" . maŇč °aaj sano~u pa…¨~…ģaka…ôn ami taŇčtaŇč to~ura naŇčkapaj ato~u tankaw , maŇč °aaj a sańßo~u…ĺo~u…ôn to~u ńß…ômaj, nikao~uri…ĺa o~uno~u no~umita o~u paŇč ¶ańß i sako~uńßaw ńßana ¶a ńßa…ĺo~upapańß ato~u ńßana nira ¶ijak no~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis. nano~uto~u °as tańßanini ńßa…ĺafinaij to~u ko~upi satamo~urak/ ¶ijak no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß, awaaj to~u ko~upinaŇč to~u mińß ¶aan, nikao~u…ĺira mananamaj to~u ami satamo~urak/ ¶ijak ko~u to~u °as no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis, ano~u itini to~u iriko~ut, ano~u itini to~u io~umańß a ¶a iro~uto~uk ami sarafa…ĺ, maŇčaaj to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak, ro~uma pa…ĺi…ĺis itini i rawa ¶ ta…ĺijo~uk no~u o~umańß, ano~u ma…ĺaro~uk ami panano~um ami patajńßi i, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u r…ôŇčaw a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~uńß…ô ¶i nira, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčansa ¶aaj kaŇč °aaj a matija o~u saitaw a mipawa…ĺi ami na °aŇč ami sańßa…ĺafin, o~u sapipa…ĺo~uma to~u tamo~urak i, pakaj…ĺaaj to~uja kako~u ¶ nira, ja ¶ańßo~u kapi taŇčtaŇč to~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak i, miri °ajaw ami ara to~u kako~u ¶ nira ami pawa…ĺi ami °i ¶aŇč, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u marawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~upipa…ĺo~umaan i, ara…ôn ko~ura kako~u ¶ ami rafo~uŇč i s…ôra to~u so~uta °, ta ro~um…ôŇčaw ko~ura tamo~urak/ ¶ijak, maara ko~u paŇčkiw no~u mińß ¶aan i, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u to~u °as nira ami …ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ i, ja ¶ańßo~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i i Ňča °aiaj to~u a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, jańß…ô ¶i nira i ja ¶ańßo~uka °ik…ôs i, Ňča °aj to~u ri °ajaw…ôn amiara, ro~uma i ano~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u °ik…ôs nira i, faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ńßa…ĺo~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ńß ńßan ami tantan…ôŇč, …ô Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇčsa ano~u °at…ôkak tato~u ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ńß nira i po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ńß…ônńßo~u tija …¨~…ģaŇč…¨~…ģaŇč…ôn. o~umaan ko~u nana °o~uŇč…ôn a ko~uma…ôn to~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. ńßaij faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~uko~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak akara…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn a ko~uma…ôn sakita, nikao~u…ĺira, ano~u ¶aaj kapina °o~un i, o~u sakatati °ińß no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč, o~u maan ko~ura nana °o~un…ôn, o~ura tamo~urak/ ¶ijak ńßawi tatiińß apa ¶amo~u…ĺ…ôn to~u karaŇč a ko~uma…ôn, ano~u ka Ēn…ôn ńßawi, o~u mara sakawarak ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ro~umasato~u ano~u o~u fo~utiŇč to~ura …ĺiji ńßananaj ato~u o~u ńßa…ĺa ato~u o~u titi no~u si…ĺi tatiińßaj to~u ama ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ, taŇčtaŇč ńßana ¶a ami sako~uńßaw, akato~u pa ¶amo~u…ĺ…ôn to~u to~umato~u ato~u …¨~…ģam…¨~…ģam, o~uja taka…ĺawaj ko~u w…ôs…ônso~u/ ¶ to~ura po~u ¶aj , jo~u ¶aj ńßananaj i, ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ a ma ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ. sanaw kapina °o~un to~u amitaŇčtaŇč a ko~uma Ē…ôn, ńßapinaŇč…ôn to~u ko~u sapa ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ tija ¶aaj ka ka…ĺi °aŇč ko~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč. (siwko~u…ĺan °amis so~u~uman****/**/**) tańßapinaŇčan****: * *******. * .
S.FORM: == Tamorak == O tamorak/o ciyak. O tamolak hananay i todongay tadafongcalay a maro dateng, itini i posong haw i, o ciyak hanangra a pangangan, ano hapinangen ko tomolak i, adihay koka sasiloma nira, irako tata'akay ko heci, irako ki^mingay ko heci, irako mato rifer no paliding a heci, irako mato to'to' a heci, halo ya ko^ngelay a teloc papah nira tada fangca:lay a kala datengen, sanaw nano 'ayaw o tamolak i otada da:teng no mita o Pangcah, ano i rotok to, ano i enal to, manga'ay to paloma to kolotamolak. Naicowaay ama lengn'ak ko tamorak/ciyak. Ano dodoen ko fana' nomi kingkiway i, o sowal nangra to pakayraay to lalengn'atan no tamorak i, naitiniay i Amirika ami salingato sanay, itiraay ko tatapangan nira saan, Nanqua hananay sanaw adi:hay itini i Amirika komatilaay, o sasanga'en nangra to Nanqua pay , lomasato malawod ko wansenchiy nangra o tamorak to ko sasang'aen nagnra to maama:an, sanaw i Amirika ko saadihaiy to tamorak/ciyak. Dodosato a tayni tini ino holaman a kanatal niyaro amarenak halo Taywan amapolong, aca ataynito iromaroma a finacadan. O pinangan no tamorak/ciyak. O pinangan no tamorak i, o milaladay ko rengaw nira matiya o masay, ano i 'enal a sotad, roma i kilang ami kalic, sanaw ira ko mipalangraay ami paloma to tamorak, nikaolira a ciheciay to tata'akay ko heci i, caay kaga'ay palangraen, matiyahan to sinal ami paloma i sera a papi dapdap ami lalad, tia cihci sato cingra i fangcalay a arang amiritod, ya kimingay ko heci i mipalanglaan amaca'it ko heci nira, o tomolak hawi caay ka 'dengan o heci nira kamaka'enay, ya koengelay a teroc ato hana nira i, tada fangcalay a marodateng, romasato yapapah nira nawhani kakahaday ngaay sapitafo to felac ami tangtang to hemay ato hakhak, hanaw irako mipanganganay to fankoa sanay,lomasa mato 'ekim ko kamaroro nira sanaw i o chinkoa han nangra a pangangan, oromasato nawhani adi:hay itini i inaka, sanaw ira ko panganganay to fangkoa sanay. O karengawan to cecay a mihecaan i itiraay to kacihrangan ato karawfawan, marawod toko roma a mihecaan i madeng to ko to'as nira a ciheci to, matafesiw to toro a mihecaan i, mariteng to mafadi' ma'icang mapatay cingra. O heci no tamorak/ciyak. O heci no tamorak/ciyak hawi, sahto maloloay ko adihaiay, caay ka^dengan aca a karadatengen, adihaiay ko iofong nira, fangcalay pacamolen i hemay a komaen, iraay ko ő≤-foloposo , ato fitamin to C/E nira, o saka ci'icel a tanektek no tileng a caay kaci adada tora 'ekan hananay, ano mitangtang to heci nira i, mang'aay halo podac han ami tangtang, oya kakoc nira fangcalay temoen a komaen, iraay koya sin hananay to saka ramakat no remes, sanaw o sowal no ihekkalay to kalocimacimahawiy "komaen to tamorak to sapatongal to remes saan" . Mang'aay sano Padakaen ami tangtang tora nangkapay ato tankaw , mang'aay a saholoen to hemay, nikaorila ono nomita o pangcah i sakohaw hanaca halopapah ato hana nira ato o kalomaanmaan ami pacacamol. Dengansa caay kangaay a pacefasa apacacamol to roma a datengan, kafan'ato ami na'on to sapipacamol, olomasato caay kang'aay a misa adihay ta:to a koma^en, nawhani takalaw kora tinfen nira, ano matafesiw ko kakomaen i, tosaka tatiih aca no tileng. Masamaanay kopi satamorak/ciyak no pangcah/'Amis. Nanoto'as tahanini halafinaiy to kopi satamorak/ciyak no mita o pangcah, awaay to kopinang to mihcaan, nikaolira mananamay to ami satamorak/ciyak ko to'as no mita o pangcah/'Amis, ano itini to irikot, ano itini to iomah aca irotok ami sarafal, mangaay to ami paloma to tamorak/ciyak, roma palilis itini i rawac taliyok no omah, ano malarok ami pananom ami patayhi i, fangcal ko rengaw adihay koheci nira, dengansa caay kang'aay a matiya o saitaw a mipawali ami na'ang ami sahalafin, o sapipaloma to tamorak i, pakaylaay toya kakoc nira, yacaho kapi tangtang to heci no tamorak/ciyak i, miri'ayaw ami ara to kakoc nira ami pawali ami 'icang, dodosato marawod kopipalomaan i, araen kora kakoc ami rafong i sera to sota', ta romengaw kora tamorak/ciyak, maara ko pangkiw no mihcaan i, ma^deng to ko to'as nira ami lalad i, yacaho kaciheci i nga'aiay to a datengen, yaheci nira i yacahoka'ikes i, nga'ay to ri'ayawen amiara, roma i ano matatodong ko 'ikes nira i, fangcalay halo podach han ami tantaneng, e^dengsa ano 'atekak tato ko podach nira i podachenho tiya dangdangen. Omaan ko nana'ongen a komaen to tamorak/ciyak. Haiy fangcal toko tamorak/ciyak akaradatengen a komaen sakita, nikaolira, ano caay kapina'on i, o sakatati'ih no tileng, o maan kora nana'onen, ora tamorak/ciyak hawi tatiih apacamolen to karang a komaen, ano ka^nen hawi, o mara sakawarak ko tamdaw, romasato ano o foting tora liyi hananay ato o hala ato o titi no sili tatiihay to ama cacamol, tangtang hanaca ami sakohaw, akato pacamolen to tomato ato damdam, oya takalaway ko wesenso/C tora pocay , yocay hananay i, caay ka fangcal a macacamol. Sanaw kapina'on to amitangtang a koma^en, hapinangen to ko sapacacamol tiya caay ka kali'ang ko tileng. (Siwkolan 'Amis Suman2023/06/18) TahapinanganŚŹÉŤÄÉśĖáÁćĽ: √ė ŚćóÁďúÁöĄÁáüť§äśąźŚąÜ. √ė .
S.PHON: == tamo~urak == o~u tamo~urak/o~u ¶ijak. o~u tamo~u…ĺak ńßananaj i to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ta…¨~…ģafo~uŇč ¶a…ĺaj a maro~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, itini i po~uso~uŇč ńßaw i, o~u ¶ijak ńßanaŇčra a paŇčaŇčan, ano~u ńßapinaŇč…ôn ko~u to~umo~u…ĺak i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~uka sasi…ĺo~uma nira, irako~u tata °akaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u ki ĒmiŇčaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u mato~u rif…ôr no~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč a ńß…ô ¶i, irako~u mato~u to~u °to~u ° a ńß…ô ¶i, ńßa…ĺo~u ja ko~u ĒŇč…ô…ĺaj a t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ papańß nira ta…¨~…ģa faŇč ¶a:…ĺaj a ka…ĺa …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, sanaw nano~u °ajaw o~u tamo~u…ĺak i o~uta…¨~…ģa …¨~…ģa:t…ôŇč no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß, ano~u i ro~uto~uk to~u, ano~u i …ôna…ĺ to~u, maŇča °aj to~u pa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~u…ĺo~utamo~u…ĺak. nai ¶o~uwaaj ama …ĺ…ôŇčn °ak ko~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. ano~u …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u…ôn ko~u fana ° no~umi kiŇčkiwaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ naŇčra to~u pakajraaj to~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčn °atan no~u tamo~urak i, naitiniaj i amirika ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u sanaj, itiraaj ko~u tatapaŇčan nira saan, nan*o~u~ua ńßananaj sanaw a…¨~…ģi:ńßaj itini i amirika ko~umati…ĺaaj, o~u sasaŇča °…ôn naŇčra to~u nan*o~u~ua paj , …ĺo~umasato~u ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u wans…ôn ¶ńßij naŇčra o~u tamo~urak to~u ko~u sasaŇč °a…ôn ¶a atajnito~u iro~umaro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~u pinaŇčan no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. o~u pinaŇčan no~u tamo~urak i, o~u mi…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģaj ko~u r…ôŇčaw nira matija o~u masaj, ano~u i °…ôna…ĺ a so~uta…¨~…ģ, ro~uma i ki…ĺaŇč ami ka…ĺi ¶, sanaw ira ko~u mipa…ĺaŇčraaj ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u tamo~urak, nikao~u…ĺira a ¶ińß…ô ¶iaj to~u tata °akaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i i, ¶aaj ka*a °aj pa…ĺaŇčra…ôn, matijańßan to~u sina…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uma i s…ôra a papi …¨~…ģap…¨~…ģap ami …ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ, tia ¶ińß ¶i sato~u ¶iŇčra i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a araŇč amirito~u…¨~…ģ, ja kimiŇčaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i i mipa…ĺaŇč…ĺaan ama ¶a °it ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, o~u to~umo~u…ĺak ńßawi ¶aaj ka °…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u ńß…ô ¶i nira kamaka °…ônaj, ja ko~u…ôŇč…ô…ĺaj a t…ôro~u ¶ ato~u ńßana nira i, ta…¨~…ģa faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a maro~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč, ro~umasato~u japapańß nira nawńßani ¶ińßraŇčan ato~u karawfawan, marawo~u…¨~…ģ to~uko~u ro~uma a mińß…ô ¶aan i ma…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u to~u °as nira a ¶ińß…ô ¶i to~u, mataf…ôsiw to~u to~uro~u a mińß…ô ¶aan i, marit…ôŇč to~u mafa…¨~…ģi ° ma °i ¶aŇč mapataj ¶iŇčra. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak ńßawi, sańßto~u ma…ĺo~u…ĺo~uaj ko~u a…¨~…ģińßaiaj, ¶aaj ka Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan a ¶a a kara…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, ¶aaj ka ¶i a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~ura °…ôkan ńßananaj, ano~u mitaŇčtaŇč to~u ńß…ô ¶i nira i, maŇč °aaj ńßa…ĺo~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ ńßan ami taŇčtaŇč, o~uja kako~u ¶ nira faŇč ¶a…ĺaj t…ômo~u…ôn a ko~uma…ôn, iraaj po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ńß…ônńßo~u tija …¨~…ģaŇč…¨~…ģaŇč…ôn. o~umaan ko~u nana °o~uŇč…ôn a ko~uma…ôn to~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak. ńßaij faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~uko~u tamo~urak/ ¶ijak akara…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn a ko~uma…ôn sakita, nikao~u…ĺira, ano~u ¶aaj kapina °o~un i, o~u sakatati °ińß no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč, o~u maan ko~ura nana °o~un…ôn, o~ura tamo~urak/ ¶ijak ńßawi tatiińß apa ¶amo~u…ĺ…ôn to~u karaŇč a ko~uma…ôn, ano~u ka Ēn…ôn °o~un to~u amitaŇčtaŇč a ko~uma Ē…ôn, ńßapinaŇč…ôn to~u ko~u sapa ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ tija ¶aaj ka ka…ĺi °aŇč ko~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč. (siwko~u…ĺan °amis so~u~uman****/**/**) tańßapinaŇčan****: * *******. * .
